No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with advanced research skills for academic and professional careers (Target 4.4). It also fosters critical thinking for sustainable development (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides advanced research skills, laying a foundation for productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5) by preparing students for professional and academic careers.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances scientific research and encourages innovation (Target 9.5) by teaching students to design research proposals and conduct social science research.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on '研究倫理' (Research ethics) supports accountable practices (Target 16.6) and the ability to critically 'evaluate information' (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course provides capacity-building (Target 17.9) in data collection and analysis, contributing to the availability of reliable data (Target 17.18) for SDG monitoring.
